title: Silly Food Items
description:
This datapack adds 20 new foods to Minecraft! All of them have their own abilities and bad effects!
(Well most of them have good effects heheh)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/T4n4NU_S5U4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**⚠ Not recommended on hardcore worlds as some of these might result in death! ⚠**

**⚠ Items can only be obtained through commands! ⚠**

</details>

**This datapack adds 20 new foods to Minecraft! All of them have their own abilities and bad effects!
(Well most of them have good effects heheh)**

[Watch the Youtube Video](https://youtu.be/T4n4NU_S5U4?si=44B93Ad4rAmXLpm7)

[Visit the Planetminecraft Page to Learn more about the items!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/silly-food-items/)

## Commands

- **/trigger SillyFoods.Hungry** - make yourself hungry
- **/trigger SillyFoods.Items** - give all foods
